title: Negative behaviors
description: Strong and persistent negative behaviors that impede teaching and learning, such as whining, crying, tantrums, aggression, or self-injurious behaviors.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Instructional control (escape and avoidance behaviors)
description: Escape and avoidance behaviors that negatively impact instructional control and impede learning.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Absent, weak, or defective mand
description: The mand repertoire is absent, weak, or defective, which requires an individualized analysis to determine the nature of the problem.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Absent, weak, or defective tact
description: The tact repertoire is absent, weak, or defective, impeding language acquisition.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Absent, weak, or defective motor imitation
description: Motor imitation skills are absent, weak, or defective, potentially due to physical limitations or other barriers.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Absent, weak, or defective echoic
description: Echoic skills are absent, weak, or defective, which can include non-functional repetition such as echolalia.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Absent, weak, or defective matching-to-sample
description: Matching-to-sample skills are absent, weak, or defective, which may be related to visual limitations or other learning barriers.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Absent, weak, or defective listener repertoires
description: Listener repertoires are absent, weak, or defective, interfering with the child's ability to understand spoken language.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Absent, weak, or defective social behavior
description: Social behavior is defective for a variety of reasons, such as limited motivation for social interaction.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Prompt dependent
description: A fundamental learning barrier where the child relies excessively on prompts (e.g., to emit mands) rather than independent responding.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Scrolling responses
description: The child guesses or scrolls through words when learning new vocabulary or attempting to mand.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Defective scanning skills
description: Scanning skills are defective, preventing the child from effectively locating targets in learning tasks.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Failure to generalize
description: A fundamental learning barrier characterized by the inability to generalize skills across time, settings, behaviors, materials, and people.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Weak or atypical motivators
description: Motivators for the child are weak or atypical, functioning as a fundamental barrier to achieving significant gains.
scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Response requirement weakens motivation

scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

title: Reinforcement dependent

scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.

scoring_criteria: 0 score: No significant barriers in the targeted area, and no intervention is necessary. 1 score: An occasional problem exists and it should be monitored, but it may not warrant a formal intervention. 2 score: A moderate problem exists and a further analysis and possibly an intervention program should be considered before the problem becomes worse. 3 score: A persistent problem exists and is in need of a behavioral analysis and formal intervention program. 4 score: A severe problem exists and is also in need of an analysis and formal intervention program.
